understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem (+) tile by navigating the grid through horizontal movement and gravity-based falling, using clicks to clear obstacles when needed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT), after which gravity pulls you (DOWN toward lower y, UP toward higher y) until landing, hazard hit, or goal. CLICK removes breakable tiles (x) at target positions. Hazards (spikes) cause instant loss. UNDO reverts the last action. plan to prioritize passages (major y changes) and avoid hazards, with a 50-turn budget per attempt.
